name: Asset Exposure
definition: Denotes whether the asset is accessible to unauthenticated or untrusted entities via public networks.

values.name: No
values.definition: The asset is NOT accessible to unauthenticated or untrusted entities via public networks.

values.name: Yes
values.definition: The asset is accessible to unauthenticated or untrusted entities via public networks, regardless of its physical or logical location.
